session.user:
Run the following commands and report results:
1. `uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/wt/ tests/commands/ -v 2>&1 | tail -40` 2. `uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/wt/ tests/commands/workspace/ 2>&1`
Working directory: /home/runner/work/erk/erk
Report all output including any errors or failures, specifically: total counts, pass/fail status, and any failure details.
session.assistant: I'll execute both commands and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/wt/ tests/commands/ -v 2>&1 | tail -40
Run pytest on wt commands and tests/commands with verbose output, last 40 lines

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/wt/ tests/commands/workspace/ 2>&1
Run ruff check on workspace-related source and test code

session.assistant:
## Results Summary
**pytest** passed: 1170 tests passed in 5.80s - No failures or errors - Coverage includes tests for wt commands and comprehensive workspace/workspace creation tests
**ruff check** passed: All checks passed! - No linting violations in `src/erk/cli/commands/wt/` or `tests/commands/workspace/`
Both commands executed successfully with no issues found.
